evidence_quotes.quote: If something is worded as purchase, then it should be a transfer of ownership.
If its only a license to use, then instead of purchase, buttons should say acquire license.
if an app requires full access to a PC (games with kernel level anticheats, antiviruses), it should have mandatory security audits.

paragraphs.text: As a Ukrainian living in the EU, I think I can have a word of support in this initiative. If something is worded as purchase, then it should be a transfer of ownership. I can legally own that product without having to fear that the developer will disable it. If its only a license to use, then instead of purchase, buttons should say acquire license. Also, if an app requires full access to a PC (games with kernel level anticheats, antiviruses), it should have mandatory security audits. If an exploit is discovered, that app can have a devastating blow on EU citizens privacy
